content:
Turn any git repository into a portable AI agent with GitAgent. It’s a framework-agnostic standard that decouples agent definitions from specific AI platforms.  Using simple files in a repo, you can create, share, and manage AI agents with full version control.

• Define agents by adding just two files: agent.yaml (manifest) and SOUL.md (identity)
• Achieve portability across frameworks like OpenAI, Claude Code, CrewAI, and AutoGen via adapters
• Leverage git workflows for versioning, forking, collaboration, and validation via CI/CD
• Built-in compliance support for financial regulations with role-based controls and segregation of duties
